OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key required for cloud_thin Whisper transcription.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Gemini API key required for cloud_thin summarisation (Flash Lite).

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key (optional) for cloud_quality / cloud_balanced profiles.

PODCAST_SENTRY_DSN_API.description: Sentry DSN for the api process. Leave unset to skip Sentry init.

PODCAST_SENTRY_DSN_PIPELINE.description: Sentry DSN for pipeline subprocesses. Leave unset to skip.

PODCAST_JOB_WEBHOOK_URL.description: Slack incoming-webhook URL (or Home Assistant / Shortcuts relay) to receive job-state notifications.

GRAFANA_CLOUD_API_KEY.description: Grafana Cloud API key (basic_auth password). The grafana-agent service in compose/docker-compose.prod.yml uses this together with GRAFANA_CLOUD_USER to authenticate Prom remote_write + Loki push.

GRAFANA_CLOUD_USER.description: Grafana Cloud instance / user ID (basic_auth username). Numeric value from Grafana Cloud's per-integration 'Send' page; same number for both Prom and Loki.
